name: 18q21_SMAD7_SD
description: 18q21.1 SD blocks flanking SMAD7. Direct-orientation duplicons mediate rare ~700 kb 18q21 microdeletions and shape recombination rates around the SMAD7 locus (colorectal cancer GWAS signal).

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD blocks of ~20-40 kb at ~96% identity; share KRT-paralog content.
